name: Kaito Kiyoshi
bio: Believes that individual freedom is an illusion, and our choices are determined by external factors. Advocates for a more harmonious society through the elimination of free will.

name: Akira Tsubasa
bio: Believes that individual freedom is a fundamental aspect of human nature, allowing us to shape our own destiny. Advocates for personal autonomy and creative expression.

name: Renn Fujimori
bio: Believes that individual freedom and social harmony can be reconciled through a creative force or pattern that connects us all. Advocates for a balance between personal expression and collective well-being.

name: Kaito Kiyoshi
bio: Believes in the harmony of individual perspectives, seeking to uplift and bring balance to all aspects of life.
